mapper.select: SELECT * FROM chat_message WHERE (sender_id = #{userId} AND receiver_id = #{friendId}) OR (sender_id = #{friendId} AND receiver_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY create_time ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0

SELECT t.contact_id AS contactId, u.nickname, u.avatar, t.last_content AS lastContent, t.last_time AS lastTime, IFNULL(unread.cnt, 0) AS unreadCount FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN sender_id = #{userId} THEN receiver_id ELSE sender_id END AS contact_id, content AS last_content, create_time AS last_time FROM chat_message WHERE id IN ( SELECT MAX(id) FROM chat_message WHERE sender_id = #{userId} OR receiver_id = #{userId} GROUP BY CASE WHEN sender_id = #{userId} THEN receiver_id ELSE sender_id END ) ) t JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = t.contact_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT sender_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM chat_message WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0 GROUP BY sender_id ) unread ON unread.sender_id = t.contact_id ORDER BY t.last_time DESC
